treeio v1.17.2

Objects exported from other packages

Source: R/AllClasses.R, R/ape.R, R/method-as-phylo.R, and 1 more
reexports.Rd

These objects are imported from other packages. Follow the links below to see their documentation.

ape

Nnode, Ntip, as.phylo, is.rooted, read.nexus, read.tree, root, rtree, write.nexus, write.tree

dplyr

full_join

magrittr

%>%

tibble

as_tibble

tidytree

MRCA, ancestor, as.treedata, child, get.data, get.fields, nodeid, nodelab, offspring, parent, rootnode, treedata
